title: SkeletonSword
description: Change skeleton bows into randomized swords!
body:
# SkeletonSword
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins
- Turns skeleton bows into randomized swords!
- Skeletons won't drop arrows or bows. They drop the sword they hold on death.
```
The Durability of dropped swords is between 5-15, here are the chances for skeleton to spawn with:
63% for Wooden/Stone Sword
26% for Iron Sword
11% for Golden Sword 
4% for Diamond Sword 
1% for Netherite Sword
```
**1.0.1 Update! Plugin folder + config.yml file added!**
- Customize the damage dealt by skeletons with each sword type in config.yml file.
- Reload configuration with ```/skeletonswordreload``` or ```/ssreload``` if you change any values!
- Enable/disable custom damage system entirely
- Required permission to use these commands: ```skeletonsword.reload```
- Players with op (/op nickname) have this required permission by default.

**1.0.2 Update!**
- Added Strays and Bogged

- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
